description_long: This object is a sculpted stone featuring two abstract, humanoid figures closely embracing each other. The figures are fused together at the torso and arms, with rounded heads and simplified facial features, giving the piece a primitive and expressive appearance. The surface is mottled with shades of brown and reddish hues, and the stone shows signs of hand-carving with visible tool marks and irregularities. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the forms blending into a single mass, while the front highlights the intimacy of the figures' interaction. The overall shape is compact and rounded, with a stable base that allows it to stand upright. The stone has a matte, slightly rough finish, suggesting it has been exposed to some weathering but retains much of its original texture.
description: A compact, hand-carved stone sculpture of two abstract figures embracing, with a mottled brown surface and a rough, matte finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the two figures' faces and arms closely pressed together, emphasizing their embrace and the expressive facial features.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the overlapping arms and the rounded forms of the figures, with less detail visible on the faces.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the fused backs of the figures, with minimal detail and a smooth, continuous surface blending the two forms.
description_view_3: This side view shows the profile of the figures, with the curvature of their bodies and the merging of their forms most apparent.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on a paved or landscaped area
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and subtle color variations, with visible tool marks and no regular geometric pattern.
attribute_weathering: Slightly weathered with a matte, rough surface, showing minor surface pitting and discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smooth, modern surfaces but can blend with natural stone or landscaped elements; typically stands out as a focal point.
